67032de4fc34f010.resultTeX: \left(\frac{m_3^2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)}{\left(m_1^2-m_2^2\right) \left(m_1^2-m_3^2\right) \left(m_2^2-m_3^2\right)}-\frac{m_3^2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_3^{-2}\right)}{\left(m_1^2-m_2^2\right) \left(m_1^2-m_3^2\right) \left(m_2^2-m_3^2\right)}-\frac{m_1^2 m_2^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_2^{-2}\right)}{\left(m_1^2-m_2^2\right) \left(m_1^2-m_3^2\right) \left(m_2^2-m_3^2\right)}+\frac{m_1^2 m_3^2 \log \left(m_1^2 m_3^{-2}\right)}{\left(m_1^2-m_2^2\right) \left(m_1^2-m_3^2\right) \left(m_2^2-m_3^2\right)}\right)+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
